title: Meeting Minutes
scenario: Create meeting minutes for a team meeting. The minutes should include a summary of the discussion, action items, and decisions made. The minutes should be generated in markdown format and should be no more than 5 lines long.
constraints: Must be no more than 5 lines long
Must include a summary of the discussion

evaluationCriteria.description: The minutes adhere to the constraints (length, discussion, action items)
The markdown syntax is correct and follows standard guidelines
The content is accurate and includes relevant information
